meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes Subcommittee on the taxonomy of staphylococci and streptococci: Minutes of the closed meeting, 13 October 1999, Auckland, New Zealand
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 1. Call to order
The acting Chairman, R. A. Whiley, called the closed meeting to order at 13 : 00 on Wednesday 13 October 1999 in the Sheraton Hotel and Towers, Auckland, New Zealand.
